items.question: What is the Clothing Promotion Short Film workflow?
items.answer: It's an AI-powered workflow that creates professional fashion promotional videos from clothing images, generating dynamic model shots, lifestyle scenes, and cinematic sequences.

items.question: What types of clothing work best?
items.answer: The workflow handles all apparel types—dresses, suits, casual wear, sportswear, accessories. It adapts the visual style to match each garment's character and target market.

items.question: Do I need model photos?
items.answer: No. You can start with flat lay images or garment photos. The AI can generate model presentations and lifestyle contexts from product-only images.

items.question: How long are the generated videos?
items.answer: Videos are optimized for social media, typically 10-30 seconds of high-impact fashion content perfect for Reels, TikTok, and Stories.

items.question: Can I match my brand aesthetic?
items.answer: Yes. You can guide the AI toward specific styles—luxury minimalism, streetwear energy, romantic elegance—to ensure brand consistency across your content.

items.question: Is this suitable for seasonal campaigns?
items.answer: Absolutely. The workflow can generate themed content for seasonal collections, holiday campaigns, or special promotions with appropriate styling.
